description_long: This is a cylindrical, metal trash bin with a weathered, dark gray finish and vertical ribbing along its sides for structural reinforcement. The bin features a removable, flat metal lid with a central handle, which is currently placed on the ground beside the bin. Two small, external side-mounted handles are attached near the rim, allowing for easy lifting and transport. The interior of the bin is visible and appears empty, with a slightly lighter metallic tone compared to the exterior. The surface is mottled with patches of grime and wear, suggesting prolonged outdoor use in urban environments. There are no visible labels, signage, or recycling symbols on the bin.
description: A weathered, cylindrical metal trash bin with a removable flat lid and side-mounted handles, showing signs of outdoor use. The bin is unmarked and has a dark, mottled finish.
description_view_0: The bin is open with the flat lid placed on the ground to the left, showing the interior and both side handles.
description_view_1: A direct side view of the closed bin, highlighting the vertical ribbing and one side handle.
description_view_2: The bin is open with the lid on the ground to the right, showing the opposite side and both handles.
description_view_3: A frontal view with the lid placed in front of the bin, clearly displaying the handle on the lid and the bin's open top.
attribute_handle_design: external side-mounted handles and a top-mounted lid handle
